name: Golf 616 Indoor Simulators
about: Golf 616 Indoor Simulators is a public-facing venue offering a warm and welcoming atmosphere for golfers in Comstock Park, Michigan. The facility features 4 public bays and 1 private bay equipped with Trackman IO technology for precise shot tracking and analytics. It operates on a per-bay, per-hour pricing model and provides affordable membership options. The venue caters to a diverse clientele, including individuals, groups, and those looking for social golfing experiences, leagues, tournaments, and private events. Beyond golf, the venue includes a lounge area serving Michigan craft beer, liquor, wine, and hot food, along with a pro shop selling Lululemon golf apparel, making it a comprehensive entertainment destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Trackman IO technology provides precise analytics and feedback to refine your game
On-site 616 Lounge offers a variety of Michigan craft beer, liquor, wine, and hot food
Flexible private rooms are perfect for personalized lessons or celebrating special occasions
Inclusive atmosphere with a variety of leagues and tournaments for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Hot food available in the 616 lounge.
Full bar with Michigan craft beer, liquor, and wine.

simulator_hardware.notes: Precise radar-based launch monitor providing detailed shot analytics.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers its own Michigan craft beer, liquor, wine, and hot food in the 616 lounge.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the pace of play and the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for kids, offering space for birthday parties and group events.
